body:
- Simplifies 'info' statements to only print on root proc
- Fixes slabocean, topo+edmf longrun config files following this [broken build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-longruns/builds/757). These bring these config files in line with Atmos defaults while we investigate potential issues with our SSPKnoth timestepper.  
	```modified:   experiments/ClimaEarth/components/atmosphere/climaatmos.jl
	modified:   src/Utilities.jl
	modified:   .buildkite/longruns/pipeline.yml
	modified:   config/longrun_configs/amip_target_topo.yml
	modified:   config/longrun_configs/slabplanet_aqua_coupler_sf_evolve_ocn.yml
	```
title: Clean up long-run pipeline, info statements.
